text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions (Iran) are creating a cautious mood, amplified by general warnings about market risk. This environment typically pressures growth-heavy tech and chip names, which form the bulk of your portfolio, especially with margin.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 31.31% and a leveraged ETF that decays. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also down significantly at 24.25% and below its stop. QQQI is near its stop at 52, currently down 1.9%. These leveraged and near-stop positions need immediate attention given your margin exposure.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and how they impact broader market sentiment. Also, monitor the performance of your leveraged ETFs for further decay.

Bottom line: Prioritize aggressive risk management on your leveraged and underperforming positions to protect your capital on margin.
plays: Sell or significantly trim SOXL immediately. It's a leveraged ETF down 31.31% and decays, a major risk on margin.
Sell SPAL. This new leveraged ETF is already down 24.25% and trading below its stop of 21.38.
Watch QQQI closely. If it breaks below your 52 stop, trim the position as indicated. No new buys today - hold and watch.
